name: Soul Franky Swing Arm Boxing Solid

issues.description: First effect is correct but incomplete. Should target up to 1 card, not unlimited choice.

Second effect is completely wrong. DSL shows 'Rest' action on opponent's Character, but card text requires: condition check (LeaderHasType=ODYSSEY AND HasRestingDon count ≥2), then activate up to 2 own Characters (set to active/unrest).
Second effect should be conditional on first effect resolving (chained 'Trigger'), not independent. Requires conditions array.

Action type 'Rest' is incorrect. Should be inverse action (activate/unrest), or use Rest with negate/inverse logic. Standard practice would require custom 'Activate' or similar, but 'Rest' here opposes intent.
Missing conditions array. Must check: LeaderHasType (ODYSSEY) AND character rested count ≥2.
